representative_quotes.text: Delivers damaged products and customer care denies any request of course doesn't want to exchange or return money and just keeps asking for reviews...what a joke this app has always been and just keeps apologizing without any resolution.. mediocre service

every time there is some problem in the order.... sometimes product is missing, sometimes less quantity, sometimes poor quality, every time there is some problem 😞 every time I have to complaint, and they give refund or replacement but it's very frustrating 😕

80 percent of the time i have to replace or refund, so much hassle in talking to customer care and retracking pickup and re pick or delivery or refund status. quality control should be checked for vendor's beforehand,

For quick 10min order, first deliver a defective product and then take another 45 mins to waste my time and initiate refund and expect cinematic level of video recording from all angle explaining the issue. Pls also pay me for the video skills I have used to record the video for your convenience and for the time I wasted which I was trying to save with 10min delivery 😒 pathetic
Always sending near expiry product even at ordering huge quantity. No return policy, Can not provision for writing product complain. No customer care no.

Blinkit has started business in my area recently,and though service was good initially,now just within few months service deteriorated drastically.They are delaying on every order,sending expired product,or on the day of expiry day,and sometimes even tring to erase expiary date by rubbing - and many items in each order turning out to be having one or other issue As a customer it's becoming buying harrasment in return of paying money. so turning out as a pathetically unprofessional compay,

Blinkit provides very low quality items.. on the other hand there are no return options.. simple saying.. as per the description items are delivered... if the customer is not satisfied with the quality.. there are no return options... very worst product.. don't buy anything from blinkit

It was very bad experience. Two times we have received expiry items. We have not even recieved refund or replacement. I will file the case against blinkit. Because this kind of behaviour should not be done with customers. They are ordering food items with wo much trust and this kind of service is unforgettable.

worst experience with the blinkit i order an item it have very poor quality and just informed with in the order received not more than 15 mins and they saying it's non replacement order or return order just making scam in a nice way 🤡

Very disappointing experience with [Blinkit]. Sometimes they deliver extremely poor-quality products, and when a complaint is raised, neither replacement nor refund is provided properly. The customer support executives were rude and ill-mannered instead of helping resolve the issue. Delivery agents are generally good, but the overall customer service experience has been very unsatisfactory. I ho
For real bhai, maine subha order Kiya tha saaman aur aaya hi nhi fhir raat ko khud hi cancel hogya aur yeh cheez 4 baar dekh chuka hu kabhi bhi saaman nhi aaya
very chor company h ye 200g ke Jagan par 138g dedal h ye blinkit wala company. stopped application

sabse gande product dekhte hain yah log complaint karne ka koi option bhi nahin Hai Maine order mangaya aur paper to bilkul defected tha Gandi quality thi mene kal 10 july ko bhi complaint ki thi 24 ghante ki pure ho gaye hain abhi tak Koi sunvaee nahin hui hai blanket bahut hi Ganda Hai please aap jo bhi product mangte Hain usko ek bar Apne se check kar le Mujhe 24 ghante ka time diya tha blanket ne maine bahut badi galti kar di inke review nahin dekha iska Koi return policy nahin Hai
koi bhi blinkit se saman mat order karo . damage item bhi daal dete hai ye log
bahut hi bekar product dete hai koi bhi mat lena

so convenient, easy and quick for a mother like me, thank you so much for existing 🫶🏻🤗 your app is very user friendly and easy to operate and I like the most is there is so much variety available in every category 👍🏻 i enjoy shopping here 🤗
Best app fast delivery ! It also has imported groceries . Best Ever!

this app is great even small to small things available in this app I really love it everything is available in this platform i really injoy to order any thing and delivery timing was best within 10 minutes the delivery partner is at my location
it is very good app and it deliver us groceries in👌 10 minutes
fastest app I have ever seen everything was fresh and good 👍 👌but sometimes my order was delayed but good

"Absolute life-saver! I live in Kapurthala, and getting daily essentials and fresh produce in just 10-15 minutes is still mind-blowing to me. The app interface is incredibly clean, and the delivery partners are always polite and quick. Perfect for busy professionals and last-minute household needs!"
Quality service,best to order items in a hurry and delivery experience so far is excellent.😊🍭
very fast service...products also come in good condition...no expiry products,it come fresh and nitly packaging 📦
very fast delivery affordable price Only quality items 👌 Delivery man's good behavior 👏

Wonderful fantastic.Apart from few very few hiccups the delivery is good.l and they do deliver good quality products in time.Just oke request remove 10 minute delivery because the delivery agents life is also precious just like everyone.
